meaning: n.尖齿,一部分,狂欢vt.使成缺口,使成锯齿状vi.刺,戳,颠簸的移动
examples: I don't know how long my crying jag lasted.
Laughing again, she was seized by a sudden coughing jag.
Rumor has it that you're very good attorney, formerly of the JAG core.
Negotiations are under way to sell Jag and Land Rover by early next year.
Keith wanted his roadster to occupy the other end of the spectrum from Jag's men's-club sedans.
